config_template.input_constraint: indices must be uint32, ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT, rank<=2 typical [batch, seq]; pad seq to TILE_SIZE multiple via ttnn.pad if seq % 32 != 0 and TILE_LAYOUT output requested

weight_transform: weight = ttnn.from_torch(torch_weight, dtype={WEIGHT_DTYPE e.g. ttnn.bfloat16/bfloat8_b}, layout=ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT); no transpose/reshape — torch nn.Embedding weight [vocab_size, hidden_dim] used as-is; output is [batch, seq, hidden_dim] (3D, callers often unsqueeze_to_4D/reshape to [B,1,S,H] afterward)
applicability_notes: Indices tensor must be integer (uint32). Output layout selectable; TILE_LAYOUT enables direct fusion into downstream add/layer_norm. Common fused neighborhoods: word+token_type+position embedding adds (BERT), embedding+multiply (scaled embed), cos/sin RoPE table lookups sharing one index tensor.; ttnn_replacement: output_tensor = ttnn.embedding(input_tensor, weight, layout={LAYOUT}, memory_config={MEMORY_CONFIG}, dtype={DTYPE})

placement_observations.size_descriptor: decoder hidden states [batch, seq, hidden] with large hidden (e.g. 4096) or prefill seq
placement_observations.source: call_site: LLM token embedding (falcon/llama/whisper/distilbert style): ttnn.embedding(..., layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG, dtype=bfloat8_b/bfloat16)
call_site: BERT embeddings — word/token_type/position embeddings all produced with memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG then fused via ttnn.add + layer_norm in L1

placement_observations.size_descriptor: decode vs prefill token embedding, x flattened to [1,1,1,batch*seq]
placement_observations.source: call_site: ttnn.embedding(x, weights, memory_config=DECODE_RESIDUAL_MEMCFG if x.shape[-1] <= 32 else ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG, dtype=bfloat16 if decode else bfloat8_b)
call_site: same conditional placement — DRAM interleaved + bfloat8_b when flattened token count exceeds one tile
call_site: RoPE setup — rot_idxs = ttnn.to_device(rot_idxs, device, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG) before cos/sin embedding lookups

placement_observations.size_descriptor: RoPE cos/sin lookup output [1, batch, head_dim], batch a multiple of TILE_SIZE

memory_config.shard_spec_template: height/width shard on sub core grid (use_height_and_width_as_shard_shape=True) when prefetcher/sub-core-grid path active; else DRAM interleaved

placement_observations.source: call_site: cos = ttnn.embedding(rot_idxs, cos_matrix, layout=TILE_LAYOUT, memory_config=mem_config) with mem_config = sharded L1 if batch%32==0 and prefetcher else ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG

placement_observations.size_descriptor: RoPE cos/sin lookup output, batch NOT a multiple of TILE_SIZE
placement_observations.source: call_site: use_rm = batch % ttnn.TILE_SIZE != 0; embedding_layout = ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT if use_rm else TILE_LAYOUT, followed by ttnn.to_layout(TILE_LAYOUT) after transpose

placement_observations.size_descriptor: embedding table [vocab_size up to 250880, hidden up to 4096]
placement_observations.source: test: weights = ttnn.to_device(ttnn.from_torch(torch_weights, dtype=dtype), device, memory_config=input_mem_config); large vocab tables kept in DRAM interleaved

placement_observations.size_descriptor: Mamba token embedding (B, L, E) reshaped to [1,1,outer_dim,E]
placement_observations.source: call_site: x = ttnn.embedding(x, embedding_weights, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16, memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG)
